description: JobPortal owner dashboard loads correctly for a user with a JP grant

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:3002/auth/login
Log in with email qa-test-journeyhawk@phronex.com and password HMqt4kH5loXkeAtvQSndQ7zNmow!Phx#9
Verify login succeeded and you are redirected away from /auth/login
Navigate to http://localhost:3002/jp/dashboard
Verify the page loads without a 500 error or blank screen
Report: what content is visible? Are there job stats, charts, or any dashboard widgets? Take a screenshot and describe what you see.

description: JobPortal jobs listing page loads — either shows jobs or a proper empty state

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:3002/auth/login and log in with qa-test-journeyhawk@phronex.com / HMqt4kH5loXkeAtvQSndQ7zNmow!Phx#9
Navigate to http://localhost:3002/jp/jobs
Verify the page loads without a 500 error or blank screen
Check: is there a 'Post a job' or 'Create job' button or CTA visible?
If no jobs exist, is there a meaningful empty state (not just a blank div)?
Report: what is shown? Screenshot and describe content.

description: JP portals page loads correctly and shows Add Portal CTA

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:3002/auth/login and log in with qa-test-journeyhawk@phronex.com / HMqt4kH5loXkeAtvQSndQ7zNmow!Phx#9
Navigate to http://localhost:3002/jp/portals
Verify the page loads without a 500 error, 403, or blank screen

Check: is there a "+ Add Portal" or "Add Portal" button visible on the page? (This page configures external job board scanning portals like LinkedIn or Indeed — it does NOT list phronex-auth instances)
If no portals are configured, is there a meaningful empty state message (e.g. "No portals configured. Add one to start scanning.") visible?
Report: confirm the Add Portal button is visible and the page is functional. Screenshot the page.

description: JP settings/config page loads and shows configuration options

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:3002/auth/login and log in with qa-test-journeyhawk@phronex.com / HMqt4kH5loXkeAtvQSndQ7zNmow!Phx#9
Navigate to http://localhost:3002/jp/settings
Verify the page loads without error
Check for: broken form inputs, missing labels, uncaught JS errors in console (check browser console), or 404 API calls in network tab
Report: what settings options are shown? Any visible defects?

description: All JP sidebar navigation links work without 404 or 500 errors

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:3002/auth/login and log in with qa-test-journeyhawk@phronex.com / HMqt4kH5loXkeAtvQSndQ7zNmow!Phx#9
Navigate to http://localhost:3002/jp/dashboard and look at the sidebar navigation
Click each sidebar link visible (dashboard, jobs, portals, applications, settings, billing — whatever is present)
For each link clicked, verify: (a) page loads, (b) no 500 error, (c) no full blank white screen
Report: list every link you clicked, whether it worked, and note any that broke. Screenshot the sidebar.

description: JP documents page loads and shows Upload Resume/Certificate CTA

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:3002/auth/login and log in with qa-test-journeyhawk@phronex.com / HMqt4kH5loXkeAtvQSndQ7zNmow!Phx#9
Navigate to http://localhost:3002/jp/documents
Verify the page loads without a 500 error or blank screen
Check: is there an Upload button or file input visible for uploading resumes/certificates (PDF / DOCX)?
If no documents exist, is there a meaningful empty state (not just a blank div)?
Report: what is shown? Confirm upload CTA is present. Screenshot and describe.

description: JP portrait page loads — either shows AI-generated profile or a locked/empty state with a CTA

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:3002/auth/login and log in with qa-test-journeyhawk@phronex.com / HMqt4kH5loXkeAtvQSndQ7zNmow!Phx#9
Navigate to http://localhost:3002/jp/portrait
Verify the page loads without a 500 error or blank screen
Is a portrait/profile card shown? OR is there a locked state explaining the feature is not yet available? Either is acceptable — a blank white screen or unhandled error is NOT acceptable.
Is there a ShareProfileSection visible at the bottom — allowing the user to create a shareable link? Check for a Create share link or similar button.
Report: what is shown on the portrait page? Screenshot and describe.
